## What this PR adds or changes

[Brief description]

## Type of change

- [ ] New pattern or best practice
- [ ] Anti-pattern or failure mode
- [ ] Correction to existing content
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Case study
- [ ] Meta (templates, structure, tooling)

## Checklist

- [ ] Content follows the [style guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md#style-guide)
- [ ] Includes concrete examples (not toy examples)
- [ ] Includes failure modes or limitations
- [ ] Model-agnostic (or clearly marked as model-specific)
- [ ] No promotional content
- [ ] Issue opened and confirmed before writing (for significant additions)
